Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 31 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Travis "Striker" Triskle vs. Randell Martell; Travis Heibert vs. Zachary Atkinson; David Dalrymple vs. Harold Brun; Devon Smith vs. Kevin Legasse [title fight].

Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Teeik Silva vs Edgars Skrivers
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Teeik Silva vs Edgars Skrivers

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Teeik Silva vs Edgars Skrivers
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Teeik Silva vs Edgars Skrivers
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Teeik Silva vs Edgars Skrivers

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Pedro “Roman” Roig vs. Jesus Paucarcaja-Lopez

Video.summary: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Vanessa Bellegarde as we delve into the life of a coach.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Vanessa Bellegarde
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Vanessa Bellegarde

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Vanessa Bellegarde
Day in the Life of a Coach - Vanessa Bellegarde

Video.summary: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.
Video.grandparentTitle: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Video.title: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

Image.alt: Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03
Ultimate Warrior Challenge - Episode 03

UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. Video.summary: Sean Michaels starts the day either training or in the sauna, but his favorite part of MMA is hard sparring! In this episode, Sean shares his tactics for the fight, how he evaluates his opponent and how patience pays off.
